questions.question: Explain why the Laplacian operator produces double edges and how this issue is addressed.
keyPoints: Laplacian is a second-order derivative operator
It produces zero-crossings at edge locations
Results in double edges on both sides of actual edge
Addressed by finding zero-crossings or using Marr-Hildreth approach

questions.question: Describe the Canny edge detection algorithm in detail, explaining the purpose of each step.
keyPoints: Edge tracking to connect broken segments
